body_txt: A female character who hates women and views them as inferior, either to men or to herself. Typically comes in a few variations:  Subtrope of Boomerang Bigot . In the rare case that she also applies the misogyny to herself as well (through self-hatred and/or needless self-imposed limitations) it also becomes Internalized Categorism . Can overlap Does Not Like Men , despite appearing contradictory, as women holding bigoted views towards other women doesn't mean they can't hold (and in some cases, ironically, may even stem from) similarly bigoted views towards men as well. Compare and contrast with Effeminate Misogynistic Guy , except that the contradiction is much more direct. See also Territorial Smurfette , where the female lead will act antagonistic towards a new woman in the group. Sadly, this is sometimes Truth in Television , so No Real Life Examples, Please! noreallife
